raw_title: Fundi Tshazibana: Building climate resilience amid structural shocks and policy divergence
raw_content: Address by Ms Fundi Tshazibana, Deputy Governor of the South African Reserve Bank and Chief Executive Officer of the Prudential Authority, at the South African Reserve Bank (SARB)-Network for Greening the Financial System (NGFS) Research Conference "Navigating climate risks in Southern Africa", hosted by the SARB, Pretoria, 11 March 2026.
